calibration.note: Conservative first CI guard. Replace guard values with GitHub Actions medians after 5-10 stable runs.

metricUnits.rpsMin: requests/second, median across runs, lower is worse
metricUnits.latencyP99MaxMs: milliseconds, median p99 across runs, higher is worse
metricUnits.errorsMax: total autocannon connection errors across all runs
metricUnits.latencyP97_5Ms: milliseconds, report-only; autocannon exposes p97_5, not p95
metricUnits.cpuProfiles: V8 --prof raw isolate logs plus processed profile.txt files, uploaded as CI artifacts
metricUnits.minTotalTicks: minimum V8 CPU profile ticks required for a useful sample
metricUnits.maxGcPct: maximum allowed GC share in processed V8 CPU profile summary
metricUnits.maxUnaccountedPct: maximum allowed unaccounted share in processed V8 CPU profile summary

cpuProfileGuard.note: Sanity guard only. Top JavaScript/C++ symbols are parsed into summary.json but are report-only until stable CI baselines exist.

base.guard: portable smoke-regression threshold until CI medians are collected

headers.description: GET /headers response header staging and repeated Set-Cookie path
headers.guard: portable smoke-regression threshold until CI medians are collected

post-base.description: POST /base JSON body parsing hot path
post-base.guard: portable smoke-regression threshold until CI medians are collected
